creator: michael.scheidell@secnap.com
text:
most likely same problem as PR ports/161922 
<http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=161922&cat=ports>
we are having a problem with the tinderbox.
math/saga depends on graphics/gdal, which depends on devel/doxygen
devel/doxygen just hangs, trying to compile.
